title: ConsentRecord
description: An auditable record of a data subject's consent decision for one or more privacy purposes, captured by a consent management platform or first-party application.

consent_id.description: Stable identifier for this consent record.

data_subject_id.description: Pseudonymous identifier for the data subject who granted or denied consent.

controller.description: Legal entity acting as data controller for the processing covered by this consent.

jurisdiction.description: Primary legal jurisdiction whose privacy regime governs this consent record.

purposes.description: Processing purposes the data subject granted or denied consent for.

legal_basis.description: Legal basis claimed for the processing covered by this record.

consent_string.description: Optional machine-readable consent string, such as an IAB TCF v2.2 string or a GPP string.

captured_at.description: Timestamp the consent decision was recorded.

expires_at.description: Optional timestamp at which this consent record must be re-collected.

source.description: Surface and signal that produced the consent decision.

ip_address.description: IP address that submitted the consent decision, if retained.

user_agent.example: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 14_5) AppleWebKit/605.1.15

gpc_signal.description: Whether the inbound request asserted Global Privacy Control.

evidence_url.description: URL to retained evidence of the consent prompt shown to the data subject.
